summary: Frontend testing completed for streamlined onboarding flow. All 8 features verified successfully. /join page loads with 4-step flow, plan parameters pre-select correctly, video testimonials stop after playing once, and all CTAs link to /join with appropriate plan parameters.

join_page_step1.details: /join page loads with Step 1 'Tell us about your furry friend'

join_plan_trial.details: /join?plan=trial pre-selects Pet Pass Trial plan on Step 3

join_plan_foundation.details: /join?plan=foundation pre-selects Pet Pass Foundation plan on Step 3

step_indicator_4_steps.details: Step indicator shows 4 steps with current step highlighted (purple gradient with scale-110)

video_testimonials_no_loop.details: Testimonial videos have loop=false and onEnded handler to stop after playing once

membership_ctas_link_to_join.details: All membership CTAs on landing page link to /join with plan parameter

14_pillars_begin_journey_button.details: 'Begin Your Journey' button in 14 Pillars section links to /join

PetSoulOnboard.jsx.plan_parameter_handling: Correctly reads plan from URL: const initialPlan = searchParams.get('plan') || 'explorer'
PetSoulOnboard.jsx.step_flow: 4-step flow: Pet Details → Parent Details → Plan Selection → Welcome
PetSoulOnboard.jsx.validation: Proper validation on each step before proceeding

Home.jsx.video_testimonials: onEnded handler correctly stops video after playing once
Home.jsx.ctas: All CTAs use React Router Link component with /join routes
Home.jsx.background_video: Hero background video has loop=true (expected for background)

App.js.routes: Both /join and /pet-soul-onboard routes correctly point to PetSoulOnboard component

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features for streamlined onboarding flow verified. /join page works with 4-step flow. Plan parameters (explorer, trial, foundation) correctly pre-select plans. Video testimonials stop after playing once (onEnded handler). All CTAs link to /join with appropriate plan parameters. Note: Hero background video has loop=true which is expected behavior.
